creator: evfbsd@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 194544
patch for files/tracd

When specifying tracd_env in /etc/rc.conf, an error occurs when tracd starts.
The reason is the use of the reserved variable ${name}_env from the system script /etc/rc.subr
This error also present in www/trac-devel.

The attached patch for files/tracd.in solves this problem.
